title: stelis supervivens
intro: Stelis supervivens is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis supervivens have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and inflammation, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Stelis supervivens is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
